members.name: John B. Sawyer
members.title: Founder, Principal & Chief Executive Officer
members.bio: John B. Sawyer is the Founder, Principal, and Chief Executive Officer of Hemisphere Aerospace Investments, providing executive leadership across HAI and Hemisphere Defense. With more than 35 years in commercial aerospace, including three decades in executive and board-level roles, he directs the company's commercial strategy, investor relations, and new business development. A precision deal-maker with a global network, he has originated, negotiated, and closed more than 250 aircraft transactions, including a principal role in the 2003 US Airways acquisition of 105 aircraft, one of the largest used-aircraft transactions in history. He also launched a 737-400 passenger-to-freighter conversion program spanning more than 40 aircraft, with recent B737-800 sales and retrofits for SpaceX and RTX Corporation.

members.name: Craig McPike
members.title: Chair, Board of Strategy & Oversight
members.bio: Craig McPike, Brigadier General, U.S. Air Force Retired, chairs the Board of Strategy and Oversight for Hemisphere Defense, guiding defense strategy, program oversight, and senior engagement with government, allied, and industry partners. He brings more than 32 years of leadership, including command of organizations exceeding 12,000 personnel, direction of multi-billion-dollar defense portfolios, and service as Deputy Director of Operations (Deputy J3) for U.S. Southern Command. A command pilot with more than 4,000 flight hours in the KC-135 and C-17, he applies decades of operational leadership to advancing autonomous maritime and unmanned defense systems.

members.name: Kenneth Stetham
members.title: Strategy & Innovation
members.bio: Kenneth supports strategy and innovation for Hemisphere Defense, helping define priorities for the defense line of business and evaluate emerging capabilities, technologies, and program opportunities. He contributes to strategic planning, positioning, and long-term growth initiatives.

members.name: Rob Riedell
members.title: Programs & Procurement
members.bio: Rob leads program execution and procurement across HAI and Hemisphere Defense. His work includes contracting, purchasing, supplier coordination, material and service sourcing, and tracking cost, schedule, and supplier performance to keep programs organized, supplied, and moving forward.

members.name: Chip Fichtner
members.title: Head of Engineering
members.bio: Chip serves as Head of Engineering for Hemisphere Defense programs. He leads system and platform engineering, technical design, engineering standards, and technical execution across program development efforts, working with leadership to move concepts from design toward execution.

members.name: Dalton Sawyer
members.title: Technical Direction
members.bio: Dalton supports technical direction across HAI and Hemisphere Defense programs, helping align engineering interfaces, technical standards, and program requirements. His role focuses on ensuring technical work remains coordinated with program objectives and leadership priorities.

members.name: Thomas Leath
members.title: Partner & Chief Business Development Officer
members.bio: Thomas Leath serves as Partner and Chief Business Development Officer of Hemisphere Aerospace Investments. He leads business development, investor relationships, strategic partnerships, and growth initiatives, bringing a broad cross-industry network to support the company's long-term expansion and capitalization.

members.name: Cody Blossman
members.title: Chief Operating Officer & Chief of Staff
members.bio: Cody serves as Chief Operating Officer and Chief of Staff, overseeing day-to-day operations and internal coordination across the organization. His role focuses on aligning teams, processes, staffing, and execution with leadership priorities across HAI and affiliated defense initiatives.
